title: John C. McGinley Reveals 'Scrubs' Dr. Cox Season 2 Shockers
body:
In a shocking turn of events, the beloved medical comedy series "Scrubs" has seen the return of its fan favorite character, Dr. Cox, played by John C. McGinley. The character's long-awaited comeback has sent shockwaves of excitement throughout the show's devoted fan base, and McGinley has been speaking out about the experience. With the season one finale just around the corner, fans are eagerly anticipating what's in store, and McGinley's recent interview has only added to the anticipation. The actor has been dropping hints about the upcoming season, including the potential return of Jordan and a stronger presence for Dr. Cox in season two.

For those who may have missed the latest episode, "My Odds," the return of Dr. Cox has been a major plot point. The character's arrival has brought a new dynamic to the show, and fans are excited to see how his presence will impact the rest of the season. McGinley's portrayal of the tough but lovable doctor has been a highlight of the series, and his return is a welcome addition to the cast. As the season one finale approaches, fans are speculating about what's in store, and McGinley's comments have only added to the speculation.

The return of Dr. Cox is a significant development in the series, and it's clear that the show's writers have big plans for the character. McGinley's comments about the season one finale suggest that there will be some major plot twists in store, and fans are eagerly anticipating the outcome. The show's ability to balance humor and drama has been a key factor in its success, and the return of Dr. Cox is a testament to the show's ability to evolve and surprise its audience. As the season draws to a close, fans are on the edge of their seats, wondering what's next for the characters they've grown to love.

One of the most exciting aspects of McGinley's recent interview is the hint of a stronger presence for Dr. Cox in season two. The character's return has been a major highlight of the season, and fans are eager to see more of him in the future. McGinley's comments suggest that the show's writers are committed to developing the character further, and that's great news for fans. With the season one finale just around the corner, it's clear that the show is poised for a major shake-up, and the return of Dr. Cox is just the beginning.

As the season one finale approaches, fans are also speculating about the potential return of other characters, including Jordan. McGinley's comments about the character's possible return have only added to the speculation, and fans are eager to see how the show's writers will choose to develop the story. The show's ability to balance a large cast of characters has been a key factor in its success, and the potential return of Jordan is just one of many exciting developments on the horizon. With the season one finale just around the corner, fans are eagerly anticipating what's in store, and McGinley's comments have only added to the excitement.

As the medical comedy series "Scrubs" continues to captivate audiences with its unique blend of humor and drama, it's clear that the show is poised for a major shake-up. The return of Dr. Cox has been a major highlight of the season, and McGinley's comments about the season one finale and beyond have only added to the anticipation. With a stronger presence for Dr. Cox in season two and the potential return of other characters, the show's future is looking bright. As fans eagerly await the season one finale, it's clear that the show's writers have big plans in store, and the return of Dr. Cox is just the beginning of an exciting new chapter in the series.
